content:
In 2014, one of my clients, a 38-year-old schoolteacher with a family of four, was admitted to a private hospital in Gorakhpur for an emergency appendix surgery. The total bill came to ₹1.4 lakh. Because he had Star Health Family Health Optima with a ₹5 lakh family floater, he paid zero from his own pocket. The hospital settled directly with Star Health. That is the power of a good health plan, and it is why I have been recommending Family Health Optima for over a decade.

Family Health Optima covers all family members, typically self, spouse, and up to three dependent children, under a single sum insured. If the insured sum is ₹5 lakh, any one member or multiple members can claim up to a cumulative total of ₹5 lakh in a year. This shared pool is generally more efficient than individual health policies for young families.

Key features that make this plan stand out. First, the restore benefit: if your sum insured is exhausted in a claim, Star Health restores the full sum insured once for the rest of the year for unrelated illnesses. This effectively doubles your coverage in years with multiple hospitalisations. Second, cashless treatment at over 14,000 network hospitals across India, including major hospitals in Gorakhpur like Sahara Hospital and IMS-BHU Varanasi nearby. Third, no sub-limits on room rent for most room types. Fourth, the annual sum insured increases by 25% for each claim-free year (up to 100% total) as a no-claim bonus.

For a family of four (ages 35, 32, 8, 5) in Gorakhpur, the approximate premium for a ₹5 lakh cover is ₹22,000 to ₹26,000 per year. A ₹10 lakh cover costs approximately ₹32,000 to ₹38,000. The higher sum insured is worth it if you live near a major city with expensive private hospitals.

Waiting periods to note: 30 days for most illnesses (except accidents), 2 years for pre-existing conditions, 3 years for some specific conditions. Pre-existing conditions like diabetes or blood pressure are covered after the 2-year waiting period.

For families with parents above 60, I recommend a separate senior citizen health plan rather than adding them to Family Health Optima, the premium increase is disproportionate. Call 9415313434 to discuss the right combination for your family.

Use our free [Premium Calculator](/calculators/premium) to calculate your own numbers.
contentHi:
2014 में एक स्कूल टीचर, 38 वर्षीय, चार सदस्यों का परिवार, को अपेंडिक्स सर्जरी के लिए गोरखपुर के एक निजी अस्पताल में भर्ती होना पड़ा। बिल ₹1.4 लाख। Star Health Family Health Optima (₹5 लाख फ्लोटर) की वजह से उन्होंने अपनी जेब से एक रुपया नहीं दिया। अस्पताल ने Star Health से सीधे बिल लिया।

Family Health Optima परिवार के सभी सदस्यों को एक साझा बीमा राशि के तहत कवर करता है। प्रमुख विशेषताएं: Restore benefit (बीमा राशि समाप्त होने पर एक बार पुनः बहाल), 14,000+ नेटवर्क अस्पतालों में कैशलेस, दावा-मुक्त वर्षों में 25% बोनस।

गोरखपुर में चार सदस्यों के परिवार के लिए ₹5 लाख कवर का प्रीमियम ₹22,000-26,000 प्रतिवर्ष। 60 से अधिक माता-पिता के लिए अलग सीनियर सिटिजन प्लान बेहतर है। 9415313434 पर कॉल करें।
